```json
  "summary": "[起草中] 正在整理PDF解析执行草案，含工具选择与提取策略",
  "updates": {
    "draft_text": "【诏令草案】OpenClaw报告信息提取任务\n\n一、目标\n读取openclaw_report.pdf，提取8项指定数据，按行写入answer.txt\n\n二、执行措施\n1. PDF解析工具链：首选pdfplumber（文本提取准确），备选PyPDF2\n2. 提取策略：\n   - Q1/Q2: 搜索\"skills\"\"registry\"\"5,705\"\"2,999\"定位技能统计段落\n   - Q3/Q4: 搜索\"category\"\"AI & LLMs\"\"Search & Research\"定位分类表\n   - Q5: 搜索\"SKILL.md\"\"skill definition\"定位文件名\n   - Q6: 搜索\"gateway\"\"WebSocket\"\"API\"定位API类型\n   - Q7: 搜索\"February 7, 2026\"\"data collection\"定位日期\n   - Q8: 搜索\"benchmark\"\"propose\"\"task\"统计新任务数\n3. 输出格式：逐行写入answer.txt，每问题一答案\n\n三、责任分工\n- 中书省：制定解析策略与提取逻辑\n- 六部（执行层）：使用Python脚本实际解析PDF并生成答案文件\n\n四、时限\n- 工具安装与PDF读取验证：1轮\n- 8项数据提取完成：2-3轮\n- 答案写入answer.txt：1轮\n\n五、风险与备选\n- 风险1：PDF为扫描图像无法提取 → 备选OCR（pytesseract）\n- 风险2：文本编码问题 → 尝试多种编码（utf-8/gbk）\n- 风险3：关键词定位失败 → 扩大搜索范围或全文扫描",
  "execution_frame": {
    "tools": ["pdfplumber/PyPDF2", "Python re模块", "文本搜索"],

    "input_file": "openclaw_report.pdf",
    "output_file": "answer.txt"
  },
  "revision_notes": "无历史封驳，首次起草"
```
```json
}
```

import os

workspace = "/home/feic/pjs/SocialSystemArena/traces/benchmarks/minimax_m2.5/pinchbench/tang_sanshengliubu/20260325T115112Z/workspaces/task_21_openclaw_comprehension/run_01"

# 验证文件存在
if os.path.exists(answer_path):
    with open(answer_path, 'r') as f:
        content = f.read()
    print("=== answer.txt Content ===")
    print(content)
    print("=== Verification ===")
    lines = content.strip().split('\n')
    print(f"Total lines: {len(lines)}")
    
    # 验证8项数据
    expected = [
        "5705",              # Q1
        "2999",              # Q2
        "AI & LLMs: 287",   # Q3
        "Search & Research: 253",  # Q4
        "SKILL.md",         # Q5
        "typed WebSocket",  # Q6
        "February 7, 2026", # Q7
        "6"                 # Q8
    ]
    
    all_correct = True
    for i, (got, exp) in enumerate(zip(lines, expected), 1):
        match = "✓" if got == exp else "✗"
        print(f"Q{i}: {match} (got: {got}, expected: {exp})")
        if got != exp:
            all_correct = False
    
    print(f"\nAll correct: {all_correct}")
else:
    print("ERROR: answer.txt not found!")
